task_completion.description: Create the first three search waypoints with correct names and symbols.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Garmin BaseCamp data list (usually bottom left), look for 'LKP - HAWTHORN RD' with a Blue Flag icon, 'CP-ALPHA' with a Red Flag icon, and 'CP-BRAVO' with a Green Flag icon.

task_completion.description: Create the remaining three operational waypoints with correct names and symbols.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Garmin BaseCamp data list, look for 'ICS COMMAND POST' with a Building icon, 'HELICOPTER LZ NORTH' with an Airport/Plane icon, and 'MEDICAL STAGING' with a Medical Facility/Cross icon.

task_completion.description: Verify waypoint coordinates and comments are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open Waypoint Properties dialog box for any of the created waypoints. Verify that the 'Position' (Lat/Lon) and 'Notes' or 'Comments' fields exactly match the task description for that specific waypoint.

task_completion.description: Create the ALPHA SEARCH ROUTE with the correct waypoint sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a route named 'ALPHA SEARCH ROUTE' in the data list. If its properties window is open, verify the sequence exactly matches: ICS COMMAND POST, LKP - HAWTHORN RD, CP-ALPHA, CP-BRAVO, ICS COMMAND POST.

task_completion.description: Create the BRAVO SEARCH ROUTE with the correct waypoint sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a route named 'BRAVO SEARCH ROUTE' in the data list. If its properties window is open, verify the sequence exactly matches: ICS COMMAND POST, MEDICAL STAGING, LKP - HAWTHORN RD, HELICOPTER LZ NORTH, CP-BRAVO, ICS COMMAND POST.

task_completion.description: Export the final collection as a GPX file to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'SAR_Middlesex_Fells_2024.gpx' visible on the Desktop, in a File Explorer window at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\, or a successful BaseCamp export dialog pointing to this path.

integrity.description: The agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to create the data package.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Garmin BaseCamp application open and being interacted with (e.g., creating waypoints, drawing routes, opening properties).

integrity.description: The agent did not manually write the GPX XML file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots of Notepad, VS Code, or other text editors containing GPX/XML markup for the waypoints and routes.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to generate the GPX file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check terminal windows to ensure the agent didn't use Python scripts, PowerShell, or commands like 'echo' to directly write the 'SAR_Middlesex_Fells_2024.gpx' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The fells_loop dataset contains 86 original waypoints mapped using ExpertGPS. The task requires adding 6 new synthetic waypoints (placed in the Medford, MA area) and 2 routes using Garmin BaseCamp. The final output must be a GPX file exported to the Desktop.
